test.notes: swell-llm: 20 tests passed, swell-daemon: 62 tests passed

priorRoundBlockingIssuesResolved.issue: init_tracer_provider() is defined but NEVER called anywhere in runtime code
priorRoundBlockingIssuesResolved.resolution: Commit 9da0572 wires daemon startup to call init_tracer_provider() in swell-daemon/src/main.rs before any LLM execution

priorRoundBlockingIssuesResolved.issue: OtelConfig::from_env() is defined but NEVER called anywhere
priorRoundBlockingIssuesResolved.resolution: Commit 9da0572 calls OtelConfig::from_env() at daemon startup to load OTEL configuration

priorRoundBlockingIssuesResolved.issue: LLM backends create spans but won't be exported without init_tracer_provider()
priorRoundBlockingIssuesResolved.resolution: The initialization now happens before any LLM execution, so GenAI spans from Anthropic/OpenAI backends will be exported to the configured OTLP endpoint
